title: Russia rocks Ukrainian capital with massive assault, killing at least 17
summary_full: Dozens were injured overnight in Kyiv during an attack that caused fires and explosions throughout the city.
summary_public: Dozens were injured overnight in Kyiv during an attack that caused fires and explosions throughout the city.
